ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag on this card. Depicted figure is unnamed armored cathar/inquisitor; not conflated with the flavor-text speaker Manfried Ulmach (named NPC, but only the speaker, never depicted on a card per available sources).

trivia_bullets.text: First printed in Eldritch Moon (EMN #35, 2016-07-22), not Shadows over Innistrad. Scryfall lists EMN as the original (reprint:false), with later reprints in Masters 25 (A25 #24, 2018) and on The List slot A25-24 (2019) — the printing this copy is from, despite being sleeved as Mystery Booster.

Flavor text reads verbatim: "A boon from the angels should never be cast aside." — Manfried Ulmach, Chief Inquisitor. Note: the card MD's Vision section transcribes the speaker as 'Ulnach' — the canonical Scryfall spelling is 'Ulmach' (worth correcting upstream).

Speaker Manfried Ulmach is a named Innistrad NPC — Chief Inquisitor of the Lunarch Inquisition (the church's enforcement arm headquartered in Nephalia). MTG Wiki and community lore archives describe him as notably cruel; Thalia is reported to have objected to his conduct at Elgaud. He appears only in flavor text, not as a depicted card subject. The unnamed figure shown on this card is NOT Ulmach — Ulmach is the quoted speaker commenting on the mantle, not its wearer.
sources: MTG Wiki: Manfried Ulmach (via search snippet)
MTG Wiki: List of secondary characters/Innistrad

trivia_bullets.text: Art by Anastasia Ovchinnikova; the same illustration has been used across every printing (EMN, A25, PLST, SIR digital, Innistrad Remastered INR #31 and the borderless retro-frame INR #344, released 2025-01-24).

Niche but not dead — EDHREC rank ~17,824; appears in roughly 0.06% of decks tracked. Top Commander homes are Aura/Voltron shells: Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice (1.7% inclusion), Mazzy, Truesword Paladin (4.6%), and Eriette of the Charmed Apple. Pauper-legal, which is where the card sees most competitive consideration as a cheap +2/+2 evasion-enabler.

notes_for_curator: Caller hint that the card is reprinted from Shadows over Innistrad (SOI #36) does not match Scryfall — the original print is Eldritch Moon (EMN #35), and the actual Scryfall set for this printing is 'The List' (PLST, collector A25-24), not Mystery Booster Cards. The CSV/frontmatter mapping to Mystery Booster may be incorrect; flagging upstream.
Flavor-text speaker spelling in MD body is 'Ulnach'; canonical Scryfall flavor text is 'Ulmach'. Not in triviabot's frontmatter-edit scope to fix the body Vision text; surfacing for the curator.
